What We Do

Concrete and Demolition Services in Chicago — Driveways, Patios, Foundations, Sidewalks, Stamped Concrete, and Full Demolition

Built To Last.
Torn Down Clean.

From a backyard patio to a full structure tear-down, Colonial handles concrete and demolition with the kind of care that makes neighbors ask who did the work.

Concrete Work

Driveways, patios, sidewalks, foundations, stairs, retaining walls. Poured, finished, and cured to last for decades.

Driveways Patios Foundations Sidewalks

Demolition

Selective tear-outs, full structure demolition, garage knockdowns, concrete removal. We bring it down clean and haul it away.

Residential Commercial Selective Haul-Off

Foundations

New build foundations, footings, basement walls, and structural pours. Built level, built square, built to last.

New Build Footings Basements Excavation

Sidewalks & Walkways

Public walks, private paths, ADA-compliant ramps, and curb work. Smooth pours, broom finish, clean control joints.

Sidewalks Walkways Curbs ADA Ramps

Interior Demolition

Full interior gut-outs, drywall and ceiling removal, floor tear-outs, and concrete slab demo. Clean, contained, and fully hauled away.

Gut-Outs Drywall Slab Removal Commercial

Our Story

About Colonial Concrete and Demolition Co. — Licensed and Insured Chicago Contractor Based in Avondale

Old-School Work,
New School Standards.

Colonial Concrete & Demolition is built on the kind of work ethic Chicago's been pouring since the great fire — show up, do it right, stand behind it. We pour driveways your grandkids will park on. We tear down what needs to come down, and we leave the site cleaner than we found it.

Licensed & Insured

Fully covered. Your property is protected from the moment we pull up.

Chicago Owned & Operated

We're not a national chain. We're your neighbors, and our reputation lives here.

No Hidden Costs

The estimate you sign is the bill you pay. Surprises are for birthdays.

Clean Job Sites

Concrete dust and rubble out. We don't leave a mess for you to deal with.

"
Every pour, every tear-down — we work it like the property's our own. Because in Chicago, the only thing tougher than concrete is your reputation.
— The Colonial Crew

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions About Concrete and Demolition Work in Chicago

Good Questions.
Honest Answers.

Are you licensed and insured?
Yes — fully licensed and insured in Illinois. We can provide certificates before any work begins. Your property is protected from minute one.
How fast can you get out for an estimate?
Usually within a few days. Call or text 708-655-4925 and we'll get you on the schedule fast. Estimates are always free.
Do you handle both residential and commercial?
Both. From a single-family driveway to a commercial demo — same crew, same standards.
How long does a typical driveway take?
Most residential driveways are tear-out, prep, and pour in 2-3 days, then cure time. We'll walk you through the timeline at the estimate.
Do you haul the debris away?
Always. Every job includes complete cleanup and haul-off. You won't be staring at a pile of rubble when we leave.
What about permits?
We handle most permits for you. Chicago and the suburbs each have different rules — we navigate it so you don't have to.
Let's Get Building
